|range=100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]<ref name="AEG-Range">''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' provides each ranged weapon with a base range given in [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. Each weapon has a maximum range equal to ten increments of the base range. The SBP-200 is given a base range of 10 meters, resulting in a maximum range of 100 meters.</ref>

The small [[Elmainin Armaments]] group attempted to undercut [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] and [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] with their '''SBP-200 Blaster Pistol''', which turned out to be an ineffective imitation of the more popular models. The SBP-200 was notoriously fragile, and used low grade focusing crystals, meaning the gun packed little punch. Elmainin Arms were reduced to selling most of these guns in backwater locations such as the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]].
